subject: fix(pwa): use NetworkFirst for sample images manifest
body:
StaleWhileRevalidate always serves the stale cached manifest first,
requiring 3 app opens before new images appear. The manifest is ~3KB
so the network cost is negligible. NetworkFirst with a 5s timeout
ensures users see fresh images on first load after SW update, with
offline fallback.

Tags: pwa, cache, service-worker, sample-images
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: sample-images
Semver: patch

title: use NetworkFirst for sample images manifest
